metadata.author: Citrix Systems, Inc.
metadata.comments: Solution template for Citrix Analytics CCF

metadata.description: Not used, but needed to pass arm-ttk test `Location-Should-Not-Be-Hardcoded`.  We instead use the `workspace-location` which is derived from the LA workspace
[concat('Region to deploy solution resources -- separate from location selection',parameters('location'))]
Workspace name for Log Analytics where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
resource group name where Microsoft Sentinel is setup
subscription id where Microsoft Sentinel is setup

properties.description: Gain insights into Citrix Analytics events including Secure Private Access (SPA), Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops (CVAD), risk indicators, risk score changes, and user profiles.

| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails" and event_category == "App Enumeration"
| summarize count() by event_status","size":1,"title":"App Enumeration","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"showMetrics":false,"showLegend":true}},"customWidth":"25","name":"query - 6","styleSettings":{"showBorder":true}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails" and occurrence_event_type contains "Launch"
| extend normalized_status = case(
    isempty(event_status) or event_status in ("NA", "allow"), "Success",
    event_status == "deny", "Deny",
    event_status in ("Failure", "failure"), "Failure",
    event_status  // default: keep original value if none of the above match
)
| summarize count() by normalized_status","size":1,"title":"App Launch","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"showMetrics":false,"showLegend":true}},"customWidth":"25","name":"query - 7","styleSettings":{"showBorder":true}},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","title":"User Search","items":[{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"269f72e5-84a4-4fef-8daf-3ca34e1693f4","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"usersearchtimerange","label":"Time Range","type":4,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":172800000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000},{"durationMs":7776000000}]},"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000}},{"id":"52449f06-83f5-44cf-80e3-13a932e76c36","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"user","label":"User Name","type":1,"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"value":""},{"id":"fc17df73-f1f3-4c1e-83c3-e1887187283e","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"status","label":"Event Status","type":2,"typeSettings":{"showDefault":false},"jsonData":"[{"value":"Success"},{"value":"Failure","selected":true}]","timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000}}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters - 0"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let userParam = "{user}";
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where isnotempty(userParam)
| where event_type == "datasourceSPAEventDetails"
| where entity_id contains userParam
| where 
    ("{status}" == "" and event_status in ("Success", "allow", "Failure", "failure")) or
    ("{status}" == "Success" and event_status in ("Success", "allow")) or
    ("{status}" == "Failure" and event_status in ("Failure", "failure")) or
    (event_status == "{status}")
| project user=entity_id, timestamp, operation_type, event_source, event_status, event_description, info_code, transaction_id","size":0,"timeContextFromParameter":"usersearchtimerange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"query - 1"}]},"name":"group - 9"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","title":"Transaction Search","items":[{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"9d8f4d9f-22d5-4f74-96ef-53f211d35d13","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"transactionsearchtimerange","label":"Select Time Range","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":172800000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000},{"durationMs":7776000000}]},"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"value":{"durationMs":86400000}},{"id":"716b787b-28ac-4974-9df8-b99cbb591dcd","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"transactionid","label":"Transaction ID","type":1,"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"value":""}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters - 0"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let transactionIdParam = "{transactionid}";
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
| where isnotempty(transactionIdParam)
| where transaction_id == transactionIdParam
| project user=entity_id,
          transaction_id,
          timestamp,
          event_type=occurrence_event_type,
          category=event_category,
          source=event_source,
          app_name=coalesce(app_name, saas_app_name),
          policy_result,
          status=event_status,
          reason=event_description,
          mode_of_access,
          client_ip","size":0,"timeContextFromParameter":"transactionsearchtimerange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"query - 1"}]},"name":"group - 10"}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"selectTab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"Secure Private Access"},"name":"SecurePrivateAccessGroup"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"2f53dae0-6c61-4d32-9b16-971eb0da8987","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"timeRange","label":"Select Time Range","type":4,"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]},"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"value":{"durationMs":604800000}},{"id":"08875964-ddb1-4731-a048-0c4272c95fe8","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"userName","label":"Search for User","type":1,"isRequired":true,"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000},"value":"0"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters - 0"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| order by TimeGenerated desc 
| project cur_riskscore
| limit 1","size":4,"title":"Current Risk Score","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"cur_riskscore","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}},"showBorder":false}},"customWidth":"100","name":"query - 3","styleSettings":{"margin":"100","maxWidth":"100"}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| summarize by cur_riskscore, TimeGenerated","size":1,"timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"timechart","chartSettings":{"showMetrics":false,"showLegend":true}},"name":"query - 2"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| summarize count() by indicator_name","size":3,"title":"Risk Indicator (ratio)","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"piechart","chartSettings":{"showMetrics":false,"showLegend":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"query - 1","styleSettings":{"maxWidth":"100","showBorder":true}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| where country != "NA"
| project country
","size":0,"title":"Risk Indicator (Geo Distribution)","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"map","mapSettings":{"locInfo":"CountryRegion","locInfoColumn":"country","sizeAggregation":"Sum","legendMetric":"country","legendAggregation":"Count"}},"customWidth":"50","name":"query - 4","styleSettings":{"showBorder":true}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL

| where event_type == "userProfileDevice"
| project data_source, indicator_category, indicator_name, device","size":0,"title":"Related Devices","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"labelSettings":[{"columnId":"data_source","label":"Data Source"},{"columnId":"indicator_category","label":"Indicator Category"},{"columnId":"indicator_name","label":"Indicator Name"},{"columnId":"device","label":"Device"}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"query - 5","styleSettings":{"showBorder":true}},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
| join CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL on tenant_id, entity_id
| where entity_id contains "{userName}"
| project data_source, indicator_category, indicator_name, client_ip","size":0,"title":"Related IP's","timeContextFromParameter":"timeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"labelSettings":[{"columnId":"data_source","label":"Data Source"},{"columnId":"indicator_category","label":"Indicator Category"},{"columnId":"indicator_name","label":"Indicator Name"},{"columnId":"client_ip","label":"Client IP"}]}},"customWidth":"50","name":"query - 6","styleSettings":{"showBorder":true}}]},"conditionalVisibility":{"parameterName":"selectTab","comparison":"isEqualTo","value":"User Details"},"name":"User Details Group"},{"type":12,"content":{"version":"NotebookGroup/1.0","groupType":"editable","items":[{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"78720f79-3173-44cc-856c-e61c42cc0fbf","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"timeRange","label":"Select Time Range","type":4,"value":{"durationMs":2592000000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":43200000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}]},"timeContext":{"durationMs":86400000}}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters - 7"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
| where event_type == "userProfileApp"
| summarize sum(cnt) by app
| take 10

properties.description: Gain insights into Citrix Analytics events including Secure Private Access (SPA), Citrix Virtual Apps and Desktops (CVAD), risk indicators, risk score changes, and user profiles.

connectorUiConfig.title: Citrix Analytics (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: Citrix Analytics integration with Microsoft Sentinel helps you to export data analyzed for the events(SPA, Security) from Citrix Analytics into Microsoft Sentinel environment. You can create custom dashboards, analyze data from other sources along with that from Citrix Analytics and create custom workflows using Logic Apps to monitor and mitigate the events.

graphQueries.metricName: Total Risk Indicator Summary Events received
Total Risk Indicator Detail Events received
Total Risk Score Change Events received

sampleQueries.query:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
  | where cur_riskscore >= 65
 | where cur_riskscore <= 100
 | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, cur_riskscore) by entity_id
 | count

CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
  | where cur_riskscore >= 35
 | where cur_riskscore <= 64
 | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, cur_riskscore) by entity_id
 | count

CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
  | where cur_riskscore >= 1
 | where cur_riskscore <= 34
 | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, cur_riskscore) by entity_id
 | count

dataTypes.name: CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: CitrixAnalytics_CVAD_Events_V1_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CitrixAnalytics_CVAD_Events_V1_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

value:
CitrixAnalytics_SPA_Events_V1_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

CitrixAnalytics_userProfile_V1_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

CitrixAnalytics_indicatorSummary_V1_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

CitrixAnalytics_indicatorEventDetails_V1_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

CitrixAnalytics_riskScoreChange_V1_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

CitrixAnalytics_CVAD_Events_V1_CL
            | summarize LastLogReceived = max(TimeGenerated)
            | project IsConnected = LastLogReceived > ago(30d)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions are required.

read permissions to shared keys for the workspace are required. [See the documentation to learn more about workspace keys](https://docs.microsoft.com/azure/azure-monitor/platform/agent-windows#obtain-workspace-id-and-key).

customs.name: Microsoft Entra
customs.description: Permission to create an app registration in Microsoft Entra ID. Typically requires Entra ID Application Developer role or higher.

customs.name: Microsoft Azure
customs.description: Permission to assign Monitoring Metrics Publisher role on data collection rules. Typically requires Azure RBAC Owner or User Access Administrator role.

customs.name: Licensing
customs.description: Entitlements to Citrix Analytics in Citrix Cloud. Please review [Citrix Tool License Agreement.](https://aka.ms/sentinel-citrixanalyticslicense-readme)

instructionSteps.title: 1. Create ARM Resources and Provision Required Permissions
instructionSteps.description: Click Deploy to provision the required Azure resources (Log Analytics tables, Data Collection Rule, and Entra app registration) and enable Citrix Analytics to securely push data into Microsoft Sentinel via the Azure Monitor Logs Ingestion API.

parameters.content:
#### Automated Configuration and Secure Data Ingestion with Entra Application 
Clicking on "Deploy" will trigger the creation of Log Analytics tables and a Data Collection Rule (DCR). 
It will then create an Entra application, link the DCR to it, and set the entered secret in the application. This setup enables data to be sent securely to the DCR using an Entra token.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Configure your integration in the Citrix Analytics Platform
instructionSteps.description: Use the following parameters to configure your integration in the Citrix Analytics Platform.

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Application ID (Client ID)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the App Registration Application ID

parameters.label: Entra App Registration Secret (Credential Secret) (THIS SECRET WILL NOT BE VISIBLE AFTER LEAVING THIS PAGE)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the App Registration Secret

parameters.label: Data Collection Endpoint (URL)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the Data Collection Endpoint

parameters.label: Data Collection Rule Immutable ID (Rule ID)
parameters.placeholder: Deploy the Push Connector to get the Data Collection Rule ID

dataFlows.transformKql: source | where event_type in ('datasourceSPAEventDetails', 'datasourceDPSEventDetails') | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(timestamp)
source | where event_type=='indicatorSummary' | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(timestamp)
source | where event_type=='datasourceCCCEventDetails' | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(timestamp)
source | where event_type=='datasourceCVADEventDetails' | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(timestamp)
source | where event_type=='indicatorEventDetails' | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(timestamp)
source | where event_type=='riskScoreChange' | extend TimeGenerated = todatetime(timestamp)

properties.descriptionHtml:
Note: Please refer to the following before installing the solution:

• Review the solution Release Notes

• There may be known issues pertaining to this Solution, please refer to them before installing.

Citrix Analytics Solution for Microsoft Sentinel helps you to export data analyzed for the events(SPA, Security) from Citrix Analytics into Microsoft Sentinel environment. You can create custom dashboards, analyze data from other sources along with that from Citrix Analytics and create custom workflows using Logic Apps to monitor and mitigate the events. For more details about this solution refer to https://docs.citrix.com/en-us/security-analytics/siem-integration/azure-sentinel-integration.html

Underlying Microsoft Technologies used:

This solution takes a dependency on the following technologies, and some of these dependencies either may be in Preview state or might result in additional ingestion or operational costs: a.Azure Monitor HTTP Logs Ingestion API

Data Connectors: 1, Workbooks: 1

Learn more about Microsoft Sentinel | Learn more about Solutions
